text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? You've never heard of turf<n>fortune-telling?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're supposed to count the grass<n>blades as you
run and say "They love<n>me. They love me not."

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna try it during our next training<n>session! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Trainer loves me. Trainer loves me not...<n>Just
kidding. ☆
